input: CREATE PROCEDURE `p`() BEGIN DECLARE CONTINUE HANDLER FOR NOT FOUND SET `done` = 1; END

CREATE PROCEDURE `p`() BEGIN DECLARE `done` TINYINT DEFAULT 0; DECLARE `v_id` BIGINT; DECLARE `cur` CURSOR FOR SELECT `id` FROM `t`; DECLARE CONTINUE HANDLER FOR NOT FOUND SET `done` = 1; OPEN `cur`; lp: LOOP FETCH `cur` INTO `v_id`; IF `done` THEN LEAVE lp; END IF; CALL `process`(`v_id`); END LOOP; CLOSE `cur`; END

CREATE PROCEDURE `p`() BEGIN FETCH `cur` INTO `v`; END
CREATE PROCEDURE `p`() BEGIN ITERATE lp; END
CREATE PROCEDURE `p`() BEGIN LEAVE lp; END
CREATE PROCEDURE `p`() BEGIN LOOP IF `done` THEN LEAVE lp; END IF; END LOOP; END
